## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this pull request focused on one coherent change.
- [ ] I ran `./gradlew build` successfully.
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/smoke_test_server.py` when relevant.
- [ ] I added or updated GameTests for gameplay behavior when relevant.
- [ ] I updated the README or other documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I added a user-visible change under `Unreleased` in `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] I did not include generated JARs, build output, credentials, or copied
      Minecraft source.
- [ ] I have the right to submit this work under the project's MIT License.
